1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Drammen municipality

2.description: select parcels (teig) in Drammen with area > 5000 m2

5.description: reduce 200-year flood polygons to Drammen extent (intersect kommune geometry)

6.description: find parcels that intersect reduced 200-year flood polygons

7.description: reduce quick-clay polygons to Drammen extent

8.description: find nearest quick-clay for each parcel and compute distance

9.description: sort parcels by distance to nearest quick-clay ascending
